{{Short description|2024 Italian film festival event}} {{Use dmy dates|date=May 2024}} {{Infobox film festival|name=81st Venice International Film Festival|image=Lorenzo Mattotti 81st Venice Film Festival.jpg|caption=Official poster by [[Lorenzo Mattotti]] |opening=''[[Beetlejuice Beetlejuice]]''|closing=''[[The American Backyard]]''|location=[[Venice]], [[Italy]]|founded=1932|awards=[[Golden Lion]]:
''[[The Room Next Door]]''|host=[[Sveva Alviti]]|date=28 August – 7 September 2024|website={{URL|https://www.labiennale.org/en/cinema/2024}}|chronology=Venice Film Festival|preceded_by=[[80th Venice International Film Festival|80th]]|followed_by=[[82nd Venice International Film Festival|82nd]]|artistic_director=[[Alberto Barbera]]}} The '''81st annual [[Venice Film Festival|Venice International Film Festival]]''' was held from 28 August to 7 September 2024, at [[Venice Lido]] in [[Italy]]. French actress [[Isabelle Huppert]] served as Jury President for the main competition.{{Cite web |date=2024-05-08 |title=Biennale Cinema 2024 {{!}} Isabelle Huppert President of the Venezia 81 international jury |url=https://www.labiennale.org/en/news/isabelle-huppert-president-venezia-81-international-jury |access-date=2024-05-08 |website=La Biennale di Venezia |language=en}} Italian actress and model [[Sveva Alviti]] hosted the opening and closing ceremonies.{{Cite web |date=2024-05-12 |title=Biennale Cinema 2024 {{!}} Sveva Alviti to host the opening and closing nights of Venezia 81 |url=https://www.labiennale.org/en/news/sveva-alviti-host-opening-and-closing-nights-venezia-81 |access-date=2024-05-12 |website=La Biennale di Venezia |language=en}} The [[Golden Lion]] was awarded to ''[[The Room Next Door]]'' by [[Pedro Almodóvar]].{{Cite web |date=2024-09-07 |title=Biennale Cinema 2024 {{!}} Official awards of the 81st Venice International Film Festival |url=https://www.labiennale.org/en/news/official-awards-81st-venice-international-film-festival |access-date=2024-09-07 |website=La Biennale di Venezia |language=en}} Australian filmmaker [[Peter Weir]] and American actress [[Sigourney Weaver]] received the [[Golden Lion for Lifetime Achievement]] during the festival.{{Cite web |date=2024-05-09 |title=Biennale Cinema 2024 {{!}} Peter Weir Leone d’Oro alla carriera della Biennale Cinema 2024 |url=https://www.labiennale.org/it/news/peter-weir-leone-d%E2%80%99oro-alla-carriera-della-biennale-cinema-2024 |access-date=2024-05-10 |website=La Biennale di Venezia |language=it}}{{cite news |last1=Goldbart |first1=Max |title=Sigourney Weaver To Be Handed Venice Lifetime Achievement Award |url=https://deadline.com/2024/06/sigourney-weaver-venice-international-film-festival-lifetime-achievement-award-1235985726/ |access-date=28 June 2024 |agency=Deadline}} The festival opened with ''[[Beetlejuice Beetlejuice]]'' by [[Tim Burton]],{{Cite web |last=Tartaglione |first=Nancy |date=2 July 2024 |title=Tim Burton’s ‘Beetlejuice Beetlejuice’ To Open Venice Film Festival |url=https://deadline.com/2024/07/beetlejuice-beetlejuice-sequel-venice-film-festival-opening-movie-2024-tim-burton-michael-keaton-1235999536/ |website=[[Deadline Hollywood]]}} and closed with ''[[The American Backyard]]'' by [[Pupi Avati]].{{Cite web |last=Redazione |date=2024-07-23 |title=L’orto americano, il nuovo horror di Pupi Avati è il film di chiusura di Venezia 81 |url=https://www.ciakmagazine.it/news/lorto-americano-il-nuovo-horror-di-pupi-avati-e-il-film-di-chiusura-di-venezia-81/ |access-date=2024-07-23 |website=Ciak Magazine |language=it-IT}} == Juries == The section usually also presents a selection of documentaries about cinema. Director and screenwriter [[Renato De Maria]] will chair the Jury of Film Students which – for the eleventh year – will award the Venice Classics prizes for the respective competitions for Best Restored Film and for the Best Documentary About Cinema. The Jury chaired will be composed of 24 students. The following films were selected to the ''Venice Classics'' section:{{Cite web |date=2024-06-30 |title=Biennale Cinema 2024 {{!}} Venice Classics Antique]]'' were cancelled following an emergency decree issued by the Court of Venice over a copyright dispute.{{cite news|last=Barraclough|first=Leo|date=28 August 2024|url=https://variety.com/2024/film/global/venice-georgian-film-the-antique-screenings-suspended-1236120673/|title=Venice Screenings of Georgian Film 'The Antique' 'Suspended' Following Court
